description: This structured shoe from arrow for men has a slim silhouette. The interesting cutouts referencing the classic Scottish brogue on this single buckle monk-strap pair, refines your formal look. With slick suiting or toned-down shirt and trousers, these shoes crafted from Italian leather add a definite panache to your ensemble. Upper Genuine leather upper with reinforced overlays on the midfoot, forefoot and the heel collar Dotted pattern cutouts on the overlays Single buckle monk-strap across the midfoot for style Brand button on the lateral side of the heel Soft sockliner for instep comfort Leather lining Padded tongue Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with heel Terraced grooves on the midfoot for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
